mapper.sql: id, template_version_id, tag_name, field_name, target_table, data_type, dict_type, required, sheet_index, sheet_name, cell_range, mapping_type, source_type, row_key_column, column_mappings, header_row, remark, deletion_source, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_tag_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tpl_tag_mapping WHERE template_version_id = #{templateVersionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tpl_tag_mapping ( template_version_id, tag_name, field_name, target_table, data_type, dict_type, required, sheet_index, sheet_name, cell_range, mapping_type, source_type, row_key_column, column_mappings, header_row, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES
( #{m.templateVersionId}, #{m.tagName}, #{m.fieldName}, #{m.targetTable}, #{m.dataType}, #{m.dictType}, COALESCE(#{m.required}, 0), COALESCE(#{m.sheetIndex}, 0), #{m.sheetName}, #{m.cellRange}, COALESCE(#{m.mappingType}, 'SCALAR'), COALESCE(#{m.sourceType}, 'CELL_TAG'), #{m.rowKeyColumn}, #{m.columnMappings}, #{m.headerRow}, #{m.remark}, #{m.createBy}, NOW(), #{m.updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_tag_mapping
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, tag_name = #{tagName}, field_name = #{fieldName}, target_table = #{targetTable}, data_type = #{dataType}, dict_type = #{dictType}, required = #{required}, sheet_index = #{sheetIndex}, sheet_name = #{sheetName}, cell_range = #{cellRange}, mapping_type = #{mappingType}, source_type = #{sourceType}, row_key_column = #{rowKeyColumn}, column_mappings = #{columnMappings}, header_row = #{headerRow}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_tag_mapping SET deleted = 1, deletion_source = 'USER', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE template_version_id = #{templateVersionId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_tag_mapping SET deleted = 1, deletion_source = 'SYNC', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_tag_mapping ( template_version_id, tag_name, field_name, target_table, data_type, dict_type, required, sheet_index, sheet_name, cell_range, mapping_type, source_type, row_key_column, column_mappings, header_row, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{templateVersionId}, #{tagName}, #{fieldName}, #{targetTable}, #{dataType}, #{dictType}, COALESCE(#{required}, 0), COALESCE(#{sheetIndex}, 0), #{sheetName}, #{cellRange}, COALESCE(#{mappingType}, 'SCALAR'), COALESCE(#{sourceType}, 'CELL_TAG'), #{rowKeyColumn}, #{columnMappings}, #{headerRow}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT tag_name FROM tpl_tag_mapping WHERE template_version_id = #{templateVersionId} AND deleted = 1 AND deletion_source = 'USER'
